description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional couch with a right-facing chaise lounge, upholstered in a light beige or off-white fabric. The couch features three large, rectangular back cushions and two seat cushions on the main section, with an extended single cushion forming the chaise. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven fabric with a subtle, uniform texture, giving it a clean and contemporary look. The armrests are straight, wide, and flat, matching the height of the backrest and providing a boxy silhouette. The couch stands on short, tapered black legs that are slightly angled, elevating it above the ground and adding a touch of mid-century style. There are no visible accent pillows or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional couch in light beige fabric with a right-facing chaise, straight armrests, and short black tapered legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, two seat cushions, and the chaise extension on the right.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the armrest and the length of the chaise section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel and the tops of the three back cushions.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, focusing on the chaise's length and the straight, boxy armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions on the main section, with a single extended cushion forming the chaise; all cushions are rectangular and not tufted, with no visible accent pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid, light beige fabric with a subtle, uniform woven texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, short, tapered legs in black, slightly angled outward, made of wood or metal, providing a mid-century modern appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, wide, and flat armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, rectangular profile and fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, divided backrest with three large, loose cushions; the backrest is cushioned and not tufted, providing a clean, modern look.
